art_style: A gritty fusion of glitch-art cyberpunk and stark surrealism, blending cold, clinical technological interfaces with fragmented, decaying human anatomy.
texture: Heavy digital noise, scanlines, and corrupted pixel blocks tearing into organic, water-stained surfaces.
reference_artists: Simon Stålenhag, Ashley Wood, Francisco de Pájaro
cover_concept: A male figure suspended upside down in the dark fluid of a sensory deprivation tank, his silhouette fraying into glowing cyan data-packets and raw magenta static that bleed into the black borders.
ornament_concept: A minimalist horizontal line of cascading binary code that systematically glitches and dissolves into a jagged heartbeat monitor spike.
scene_break_concept: A thin, broken fiber-optic cable strand emitting a faint, fading pulse of neon light.
map_concept: A topographical tangle of glowing server cables forming the jagged, recognizable coastline of Vietnam, overlaid with translucent, shifting street grids of Sydney.
